name: Mushrooms Tofu & Snow Peas in Soy Ginger Sauc
recipeIngredient: 1 small onion, halved and sliced thin crosswise
3/4 teaspoon cornflour dissolved in 2 tablespoons cold water
1/2 pound firm tofu, drained and cut into 1/4 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the onion over moderately high heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Add the mushrooms and sauté the mixture, stirring until the mushrooms are tender.
3. Add the garlic and gingerroot and sauté the mixture for 1 minute.
4. Stir in the cornstarch mixture, add it to the skillet with the soy sauce, tofu, and 2 tablespoons water.
5. Simmer the mixture, gently stirring and turning the tofu to coat it with the sauce for 2 or 3 minutes.
6. Stir in the snow peas and cook stirring gently for an additional 30 seconds.
7. Serve the tofu mixture over the rice. Serves 2.
